def negative_python_perf_layer_logging_overhead_log_message_formatted_before_level_check():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_logging_overhead_log_message_formatted_before_level_check"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Logging overhead. Flag f-string or format log messages built before logger level checks can skip them."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
